clusters.justification: This dimension reflects the processing of somatovisceral states, emotional valence, and mood regulation, typically mapping onto anterior salience and paralimbic networks.
These terms delineate the computation of expected outcomes, incentive processing, and goal-directed behavioral selection intrinsically mediated by frontostriatal circuitry.
This domain encompasses internally directed, abstract representations of oneself and other social agents across time, characteristically unified by co-activation within the default mode system.
